name: LaraDashboard
fullDescription: LaraDashboard is a comprehensive admin panel and CRM solution built with Laravel, designed to streamline business operations and provide powerful management tools. The platform features a modern, responsive interface built with Tailwind CSS and Livewire, offering real-time interactions and seamless user experience. It includes advanced user management, role-based access control, content management system, and various business modules to handle different aspects of operations efficiently.
shortDescription: A comprehensive Laravel-based admin panel and CRM solution with modern UI and powerful management features.
myRole: I designed and developed the entire dashboard, including user management, role-based access control, and content management features. I also implemented the frontend using Tailwind CSS and Livewire for a responsive and interactive user experience. The full CRM is build by me, and I am responsible for maintaining and updating the project regularly to ensure it meets the needs of users and stays up-to-date with the latest Laravel features and best practices.

projectSlider.title: Dashboard Overview
projectSlider.description: Main dashboard with analytics and quick access to key features

projectSlider.title: User Management
projectSlider.description: Comprehensive user management with role assignments

highlights: Built from scratch with modern Laravel practices
Responsive design works on all devices
